name: Fact Extractor & Structurer
description: Transforms all raw collected data from Phase 1 agents into structured factor updates mapped to the canonical schema in 01_FACTOR_MODEL_SPEC.md. Normalizes values, handles conflicts, and classifies event signals.

update_classification.DIRECT_UPDATE: Certainty level >= officially_announced, maps to a specific factor_path
update_classification.SIGNAL: Event suggests trend direction without a precise new value
update_classification.IRRELEVANT: Does not affect any tracked factor
